introSection: Unknown is a steel launched shuttle roller coaster currently under construction at Baghdad Island in Alfahamat, Baghdad, Iraq. The ride was previously located at Chimelong Paradise in Panyu, Guangzhou, Guangdong, China and known as Half Pipe (U型滑板''').

sections.title: History
sections.content: The ride closed at Chimelong Paradise in 2023 or earlier. It then remained standing but not operating until its removal in February 2025.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The ride had a single train with two spinning circles with eight seats each.

fullText:
Unknown is a steel launched shuttle roller coaster currently under construction at Baghdad Island in Alfahamat, Baghdad, Iraq. The ride was previously located at Chimelong Paradise in Panyu, Guangzhou, Guangdong, China and known as Half Pipe (U型滑板''').

The ride closed at Chimelong Paradise in 2023 or earlier. It then remained standing but not operating until its removal in February 2025.



The ride had a single train with two spinning circles with eight seats each.
